title: mirabilis toscae
intro: Mirabilis toscae, also known as the Toad Flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Four O'Clock family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis toscae include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis toscae often involve infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
